inputs.label: Total Imported Tonnes (steel/aluminum/cement/fertilizer/hydrogen)
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of CBAM-covered goods imported in the reporting period.

inputs.label: Embedded Emissions per Tonne
inputs.businessContext: Direct and indirect GHG emissions embedded in the imported goods (scope 1+2).

inputs.label: Carbon Price Paid in Country of Origin
inputs.businessContext: Effective carbon price already paid in the exporting country (e.g., EU ETS equivalent).

inputs.label: CBAM Certificate Price (current auction)
inputs.businessContext: Latest weekly average auction price of CBAM certificates.

inputs.label: Free Allocation Factor for Sector
inputs.businessContext: Proportion of emissions covered by free allowances in the EU ETS for the product sector.

inputs.label: Verification Status of Embedded Emissions
inputs.businessContext: Whether the embedded emissions data has been independently verified by an accredited body.

inputs.label: Compliance Deadline Met (quarterly report submitted)
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if the importer submitted the required CBAM report before the quarterly deadline.

rules.description: Self-declared emissions incur a 20% penalty on embedded emissions for compliance calculation.
Late submission triggers a fixed penalty of 5000 EUR.
If no goods imported, compliance is automatically satisfied.

thresholds.alert: High embedded emissions detected – consider sourcing from lower-carbon suppliers.
CBAM cost exceeds 50,000 EUR – review carbon price paid and free allocation.
Using default emission factors – strongly recommend third-party verification to reduce risk.

formulas.label: Adjusted Embedded Emissions (with verification penalty)
formulas.description: Total embedded emissions adjusted for verification status penalty.

formulas.label: Free Allocation Emissions
formulas.description: Portion of emissions covered by free allowances.

formulas.label: CBAM Liable Emissions
formulas.description: Emissions that must be covered by CBAM certificates.

formulas.label: Carbon Price Deduction (origin country)
formulas.description: Value of carbon price already paid in the country of origin.

formulas.label: Gross CBAM Certificate Cost
formulas.description: Total cost of CBAM certificates before deduction.

formulas.label: Net CBAM Cost (after deduction)
formulas.description: Final CBAM cost after subtracting carbon price paid in origin.

formulas.label: Compliance Verdict (primary result)
formulas.formula: if (compliance_deadline_met == false) then 'Non-compliant – late submission' else if (net_cbam_cost == 0) then 'Compliant – zero cost' else if (net_cbam_cost <= 10000) then 'Compliant – low cost' else 'Compliant – high cost'
formulas.description: Final compliance verdict based on cost and deadline.

primary.label: Compliance Verdict
primary.description: Final compliance status: Compliant or Non-compliant with cost category.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Verification Penalty Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Extra emissions attributed due to self-declared status.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Late Submission Fee
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Fixed penalty for missing the quarterly deadline.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Inefficient Free Allocation Gap
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Emissions not covered by free allowances due to sector allocation factor.

suggestedActions.label: Obtain third-party verification of embedded emissions
suggestedActions.description: Reduces penalty factor from 1.2 to 1.0, lowering liable emissions.

suggestedActions.label: Review free allocation factor eligibility
suggestedActions.description: Ensure product classification matches correct sector to maximize free allowances.

suggestedActions.label: Source from suppliers with lower embedded emissions
suggestedActions.description: Directly reduces total embedded emissions and CBAM cost.

suggestedActions.label: Set up automated quarterly reporting to avoid late fees
suggestedActions.description: Prevents 5000 EUR penalty and non-compliance status.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Score
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Confidence in the accuracy of input data based on verification status.
